ASCII + HEX compact version
Test sequence:
stop -> set target uart -> kp=0 -> ki=0 -> kd=0
forward: 500 -> 600 -> 800 -> 1000, each 4s
stop -> wait 2s
reverse: -500 -> -600 -> -800 -> -1000, each 4s
stop -> status
Line ending: CRLF, \r\n
Command delay: 200 ms
Stage delay: 4000 ms
Stop delay: 2000 ms
